people.text: Emily wants gentle exercise after work because she spends all day sitting. She prefers indoor classes with calm music.
Jake enjoys competitive team sports and wants evening training sessions during the week.
Hana wants to improve flexibility and reduce stress. She prefers small classes with experienced instructors.
Leo needs cheap exercise classes near the city centre because he travels by bus after work.
Sophie wants energetic dance workouts suitable for beginners who have never used a gym.

texts.text: Active Centre provides [9]low-cost fitness sessions[/9] close to the main bus station in the [9]city centre[/9].
School Swim Club is only available to teenagers under sixteen.
Dance Burn uses simple routines and modern music. It is [10]designed for beginners[/10] who want [10]high-energy dance exercise[/10] without traditional gym training.
Quiet Yoga runs in groups of ten and focuses on [8]improving flexibility[/8] and reducing stress. Classes are led by [8]experienced instructors[/8] with many years of teaching.
Mountain Cycling prepares experienced riders for difficult countryside races.
Stretch and Relax combines [6]gentle indoor exercise[/6] with soft music and simple movements. It is designed for people who spend [6]long hours sitting at work[/6].
Power Lifting requires previous weight-training experience and personal equipment.
City Basketball Club offers [7]weekday evening training[/7] and regular matches against local teams. New players who enjoy [7]competitive sports[/7] are welcome.

answers.explanation: Emily needs gentle indoor exercise after sitting all day.
Jake wants competitive evening team sports.
Hana wants flexibility training and experienced teachers.
Leo needs cheap classes near buses.
